prestazioni: Upgrade the F160 V8 3.8L twin-turbo engine with a bespoke **Maserati Corse-approved** Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger kit (86mm compressor wheel, 106mm turbine wheel, billet compressor housing) paired with a **Weistec Engineering** titanium-aluminide turbine housing to reduce rotational inertia by 30% and support 850+ HP on E85 fuel. Requires **MotoMaster** forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, billet crankshaft) with a 9.5:1 compression ratio for optimal boost response.

Install a **MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust system** with 3.5" mandrel-bent piping, quad 5" carbon-fiber tips, and **REMUS** valvetronic bypass valves for aggressive backpressure reduction. Pair with **Akrapovič** titanium downpipes (200-cell catalytic converters) and a **Novitec** ECU flash (Stage 3+) to optimize AFR (11.8:1 under full load) and ignition timing (22° BTDC at peak torque).

Replace the stock ZF 8HP75 transmission with a **Weistec TH8A** 8-speed automatic with a **Porsche GT3-spec torque converter** (300ms lockup, 3,800 RPM stall) and **South Bend Clutch** triple-disc carbon-metallic clutch pack. Add a **Maserati Corse** limited-slip differential (40% lockup under load) and **H&R** lowering springs (-35mm front, -30mm rear) with **Öhlins Road & Track** coilovers (20-way adjustable damping, 300lb/in front springs, 220lb/in rear springs).
estetica: Fit a **Novitec Torado** widebody kit (carbon-fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **Rocket Bunny** overfenders (35mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) to accommodate **HRE FF03** 22x10.5" ET35 (front) and 22x12.5" ET40 (rear) wheels wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** 265/35R22 (front) and 305/30R22 (rear) semi-slick tires.

Apply a **3M 1080 Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** with **Maserati Corse** Trofeo decals (red/white/blue stripe package) and **Vorsteiner** carbon-fiber hood (functional heat extractors, 12kg weight reduction). Install **Seibon** carbon-fiber doors (pre-preg autoclave construction) and a **Novitec** rear spoiler (adjustable angle, +150kg downforce at 200km/h).

Replace all exterior lighting with **Lux H8 V4** LED headlights (6,000K, adaptive matrix beam), **Morimoto XB35** fog lights, and **Diode Dynamics SS360** sequential turn signals. Interior upgrades include **Recaro Pole Position** carbon-fiber bucket seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses), **MOMO** carbon-fiber steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara grip), and **Alcantara** headliner/door cards with **Maserati Corse** embroidered logos.
